description: Efficient parallel thinking framework built on vLLM for LLM reasoning tasks with confidence-based early stopping and multiple voting strategies

key_modules.deepconf: Core library with wrapper.py, outputs.py, utils.py for parallel reasoning
key_modules.R-KV: KV cache compression algorithms (R-KV, SpecKV, SnapKV, H2O, StreamingLLM)
key_modules.weian_development: Development scripts including SpeckV sparse pruner implementation
